item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice and create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Crispy fried marinated chicken with classic Caesar salad and roasted potatoes. Homemade Caesar dressing (1+2+6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: Beef giligang – slow-cooked spiced beef in Filipino braising sauce with vegetables, steamed rice and fresh spring onions. Served with Filipino tomato salad and tangy citrus dressing (6+7+15) GREEN DISH: dish Pea protein giligang – slow-cooked spiced pea protein in Filipino braising sauce with vegetables, steamed rice and fresh spring onions. Served with Filipino tomato salad and tangy citrus dressing (6+7+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crispy fried chicken in warm Arabic spices, served with bulgur, fresh herbs, red onion, dried fruits and juicy pomegranate seeds (1+15) GREEN DISH: dish Chickpeas and golden halloumi in Arabic spices, with bulgur, fresh herbs, red onion, dried fruits and pomegranate seeds (1+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Pork neck marinated in gochujang, slowly braised to perfect tenderness, served with fresh noodle salad (1+8+13+15) GREEN DISH: dish Gochujang-marinated aubergine, oven-roasted to golden and smoky perfection, served with fresh noodle salad (1+8+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Lemongrass-grilled chicken tossed with vegetables on an Asian potato cake, topped with Thai basil and salted peanuts. With sweet chilli sauce, coriander, smoked chilli sauce and lemongrass cream (1+4+6+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: dish Lemongrass-grilled tofu tossed with vegetables on an Asian potato cake, topped with Thai basil and salted peanuts. With sweet chilli sauce, coriander, smoked chilli sauce and lemongrass cream (1+4+6+7+8+15)
